---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Idea Description

A clear and concise description of what the new feature is.

## 🚀 Why is it useful?

Explain why this feature would be valuable for the user or the project.

## 🎨 Proposed Solution (Optional)

Describe how you imagine it working or looking.
